description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical, slightly bulging body and flat, circular ends. The exterior is constructed from vertical wooden staves, each displaying a natural wood grain pattern, and is reinforced by four evenly spaced black metal hoops with visible rivets. The top surface is flat and appears to be made from the same wood as the sides, tightly fitted to prevent spillage or entry. The wood has a warm, medium-brown tone, while the metal bands provide a stark, utilitarian contrast. There are no visible handles, spouts, or markings, giving the barrel a simple, robust appearance suitable for storage or decorative use in urban environments.
description: A medium-brown wooden barrel with black metal hoops and a flat, closed top, featuring visible wood grain and no handles or markings.
description_view_0: The barrel's front shows the wood grain and all four black metal hoops, with the flat top clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the curvature of the barrel and the even spacing of the metal hoops, with the wood texture prominent.
description_view_2: The opposite side view is similar, showing the continuous wood grain and metal bands, with no additional features.
description_view_3: This rear view maintains the same features, with the wood and metal details consistent and no visible openings or handles.
